title: Dead ternary in why_included confidence seed

findingDetails.evidence: reduce initial value is `edgeChain.length > 0 ? 1 : 1` — both arms are identical (1), so the condition is inert.
findingDetails.why: Vestigial conditional implies the empty vs non-empty edgeChain cases produce different seeds; they do not. No output impact (min over clamped [0,1] confidences from seed 1 is correct), but it misleads future readers and hides intent.
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace with the literal `1` (the correct neutral seed for a min-reduce over confidences in [0,1]), or drop the seed and special-case empty chains explicitly if a distinct seed value was ever intended.
